24 // Magewell Capture Extensions
25 
26 typedef enum _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EXTENSION {
27  // Product informations
28  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_CHANNEL_INFO, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_CHANNEL_INFO
29  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FAMILY_INFO, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_PRO_CAPTURE_INFO, MWCAP_ECO_CAPTURE_INFO
30 
31  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPS
32  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_CAPS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPS
33 
34  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DEVICE_INSTANCE_ID, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: WCHAR[_MAX_PATH]
35 
36  // Firmware upgrade
37  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_STORAGE, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE
38  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_ERASE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_FIRMWARE_ERASE
39  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_DATA, // G/S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: BYTE[]
40 
41  // Device misc controls
42  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_LED_MODE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
43  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_POST_RECONFIG, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
44 
45  // Hardware timer
46  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIME, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: LONGLONG
47  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIME_REGULATION, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: LONGLONG
48 
49  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_REGISTRATION, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_PTR64_S, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
50  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_DEREGISTRATION, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
51  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_EXPIRE_TIME, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_TIMER_EXPIRE_TIME
52 
53  // Notifications
54  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_REGISTRATION, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_REGISTRATION_S, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
55  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_DEREGISTRATION, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
56  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_STATUS, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_PTR64_S, Data: ULONGLONG
57  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_ENABLE, // S, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_PTR64_S, Data: ULONGLONG
58 
59  // Video frame information
60  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_BUFFER_INFO, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_BUFFER_INFO
61  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_FRAME_INFO, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_FRAME_INFO
62 
63  // Video capture
64  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_OPEN, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE_OPEN
65  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_FRAME, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE_FRAME
66  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_STATUS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE_STATUS
67  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_CLOSE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: None
68 
69  // Audio capture
70  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_CAPTURE_OPEN, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: None
71  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_CAPTURE_FRAME, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPTURE_FRAME
72  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_CAPTURE_CLOSE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: None
73 
74  // Input source
75  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_SOURCE_COUNT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
76  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD[]
77 
78  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_INPUT_SOURCE_COUNT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
79  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD[]
80 
81  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_INPUT_SOURCE_SCAN, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BOOLEAN
82  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_INPUT_SOURCE_SCAN_STATE, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BOOLEAN
83  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AV_INPUT_SOURCE_LINK, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BOOLEAN
84  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_SOURCE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
85  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_INPUT_SOURCE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
86 
87  // EDID
88  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EDID, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BYTE[]
89 
90  // Signal status
91  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_INPUT_SPECIFIC_STATUS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_INPUT_SPECIFIC_STATUS
92  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_SIGNAL_STATUS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_SIGNAL_STATUS
93  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS
94 
95  // HDMI status
96  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_HDMI_INFOFRAME_VALID, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
97  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DWORD_S, Data: HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
98 
99  // Video processing
100  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_ASPECT_RATIO, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_ASPECT_RATIO
101  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_COLOR_FORMAT, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_COLOR_FORMAT
102  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_INPUT_QUANTIZATION_RANGE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_QUANTIZATION_RANGE
103 
104  // Video processing (NOT functional for DirectKS)
105  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_CONNECTION_FORMAT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CONNECTION_FORMAT
106  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_PROCESS_PRESET, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS
107  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_PROCESS_SETTINGS, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS
108  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_OSD_PRESET, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_SETTINGS
109  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_OSD_SETTINGS, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_SETTINGS
110  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPTURE_OSD_IMAGE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_IMAGE
111 
112  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_CONNECTION_FORMAT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CONNECTION_FORMAT
113  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_PROCESS_PRESET, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS
114  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_PROCESS_SETTINGS, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS
115  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_OSD_PRESET, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_SETTINGS
116  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_OSD_SETTINGS, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_SETTINGS
117  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREVIEW_OSD_IMAGE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_OSD_IMAGE
118 
119  // Temperature
120  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_CORE_TEMPERATURE, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: LONG (in 0.1 deg C)
121 
122  // Image upload, can be use as source image or OSD image
123  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CREATE_IMAGE, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CREATE_IMAGE_S, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
124  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_OPEN_IMAGE, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_PTR64_S, Data: LONG
125  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CLOSE_IMAGE, // G, Prop: MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_PTR64_S, Data: LONG
126  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_UPLOAD_IMAGE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_UPLOAD_IMAGE
127 
128  // VGA/Component timings
129  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_AUTO_H_ALIGN, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BOOLEAN
130  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_SAMPLING_PHASE, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BYTE (0-31, 255 triger auto adjust once)
131  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_SAMPLING_PHASE_AUTO, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: BOOLEAN
132  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_TIMING, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING
133  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PREFERRED_TIMING_ARRAY, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING[MWCAP_VIDEO_MAX_NUM_PREFERRED_TIMINGS]
134  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING
135  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_COUNT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
136  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_ARRAY, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING[]
137  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_COUNT, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: DWORD
138  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_ARRAY, // G/S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: SIZE[]
139 
140  // Video capture enhancement
141  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_PIN_BUFFER, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_PIN_BUFFER
142  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_UNPIN_BUFFER, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_PTR64
143 
144  // SDI ANC Packet
145  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_SET_SDI_ANC_TYPE, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_SDI_ANC_TYPE
146  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_GET_SDI_ANC_PACKET, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_SDI_ANC_PACKET
147 
148  // Eco video capture
149  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_OPEN, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_OPEN
150  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_SETTINGS, // S/G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_SETTINGS
151  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_FRAME, // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_FRAME
152  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_STATUS, // G, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: MWCAP_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_STATUS
153  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_ECO_CAPTURE_CLOSE // S, Prop: KSPROPERTY, Data: None
154 } MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EXTENSION;

219 // Common definitions

232 #define INPUT_SOURCE(type, index) (((type) << 8) | ((index) & 0xFF))
233 
240 #define INPUT_TYPE(source) ((source) >> 8)
241 
248 #define INPUT_INDEX(source) ((source) & 0xFF)
249

1424 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE_FRAME {
1425  // Processing parameters
1426  DWORD dwFOURCC;
1427  WORD cx;
1428  WORD cy;
1429  int nAspectX;
1430  int nAspectY;
1431  MWCAP_VIDEO_COLOR_FORMAT colorFormat;
1432  MWCAP_VIDEO_QUANTIZATION_RANGE quantRange;
1433  MWCAP_VIDEO_SATURATION_RANGE satRange;
1434 
1435  SHORT sContrast; // [50, 200]
1436  SHORT sBrightness; // [-100, 100]
1437  SHORT sSaturation; // [0, 200]
1438  SHORT sHue; // [-90, 90]
1439 
1440  RECT rectSource;
1441  RECT rectTarget;
1442 
1443  MWCAP_VIDEO_DEINTERLACE_MODE deinterlaceMode;
1444  MWCAP_VIDEO_ASPECT_RATIO_CONVERT_MODE aspectRatioConvertMode;
1445 
1446  // Source
1447  char iSrcFrame;
1448 
1449  // OSD (within rectTarget and [0,0-cx,cy))
1450  MWCAP_PTR64 pOSDImage;
1451  RECT aOSDRects[MWCAP_VIDEO_MAX_NUM_OSD_RECTS];
1452  int cOSDRects;
1453 
1454  // Buffer parameters
1455  /*
1456  MWCAP_VIDEO_PLANE_ADDRESS_TYPE addressType;
1457  int cPlaneBuffers;
1458  MWCAP_VIDEO_PLANE_BUFFER aPlaneBuffers[3];
1459  */
1460 
1461  BOOLEAN bPhysicalAddress;
1462  union {
1463  MWCAP_PTR64 pvFrame;
1464  LARGE_INTEGER liPhysicalAddress;
1465  };
1466 
1467  DWORD cbFrame;
1468  DWORD cbStride;
1469 
1470  BOOLEAN bBottomUp;
1471 
1472  WORD cyPartialNotify; // 0: Not use partial notify
1473 
1474  DWORD dwProcessSwitchs; // MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_xx
1475 
1476  // Context
1477  MWCAP_PTR64 pvContext;
1478 } MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPTURE_FRAME;
1479 
1480
